description: Product Description Laghmani Gold Perfume Eau De Toilette Natural Spray. Fine Perfumery goal is to provide customers with many high quality products and satisfy the needs of all customers. To achieve this, Fine Perfumery will spend more time using and designing the products. Directions Apply 2-4 sprays on wrist, behind ears and neck for lasting effect. Use in moderation to appreciate the natural fragrance.
